ordinary_path.follow_on_policy: materialization_is_reached_from_storyline_handoff_or_explicit_stage_selection; book-materialization is the handoff locator and the focused materialization sequence is chapter-production-planning -> chapter-materialization -> source-style-integrity-review -> publication-proof-handoff, not independent default entries.

explicit_variants.entry_policy: requires_storyline_architecture_handoff_owner_receipt_typed_blocker_or_explicit_operator_stage_selection; focused materialization stages follow in sequence and cannot claim book quality, proof readiness, final export, or owner acceptance by provider completion alone.
